nodes.name: push.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on pushes/PRs to main: runs Ruff lint and format checks, the pytest suite across Python 3.10-3.12, and builds distribution artifacts.
nodes.languageNotes: Three sequential jobs (quality -> test -> build) chained via needs; the test job uses a matrix over Python versions and uv for dependency management.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions release workflow triggered on version tags (v*): builds distributions, verifies wheel/sdist presence, publishes to PyPI via trusted publishing, and creates a GitHub Release.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses OIDC id-token permission with a pypi environment for trusted publishing and softprops/action-gh-release for release notes.

nodes.name: quality
nodes.summary: Code Quality job that runs Ruff lint (check) and Ruff format-check against the repository.

nodes.name: test
nodes.summary: Run Tests job that installs the package with test extras and executes pytest with coverage across a Python 3.10/3.11/3.12 matrix.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Build Distribution job that builds sdist and wheel artifacts via python -m build and uploads them.

nodes.name: release
nodes.summary: Release to PyPI job that builds, verifies, publishes distributions to PyPI, and creates a GitHub Release.
